name: University of Oxford
about: The oldest university in the English-speaking world, the University of Oxford is an iconic collegiate research institution in the United Kingdom. Oxford is renowned globally for its unparalleled academic heritage, world-leading research output, and unique tutorial-based learning environment. Its rich intellectual community, distributed across 39 self-governing colleges, offers international graduate students a truly historic and highly prestigious academic experience.
scholarships: Oxford offers highly competitive funding schemes like the Clarendon Fund and Rhodes Scholarships. Most scholarships cover full tuition fees and provide a generous living stipend for the duration of the course.

programs.name: MSc in Advanced Computer Science
programs.about: An intensive, elite postgraduate program designed to equip students with deep theoretical foundations and practical skills in advanced computer science, combining mathematical rigor with cutting-edge software theory.
requirements: First-class undergraduate degree with honors in Computer Science or Mathematics
Strong programming experience and discrete mathematics background
sellingPoints: Historic Collegiate System: Live and study inside Oxford's famous colleges, becoming part of a tight-knit intellectual community of scholars.
Renowned Oxford Tutorials: Engage directly with leading researchers in intimate, high-impact tutorial discussions.
Europe's AI Powerhouse: Study at the forefront of AI, machine learning, and quantum computing alongside award-winning computer science faculty.
